title: Product Builder / AI-Native Systems Lead
summary: Led product definition and system design for an AI-native conversational platform spanning orchestration, retrieval, evaluation, and delivery workflow design.
achievements: Framed the end-to-end user journey for an AI-first product from discovery through release readiness.
Defined agent roles, handoff rules, and artifact ownership so execution could scale without losing clarity.
Translated ambiguous requirements into delivery-ready architecture and product decisions.

title: Product Strategy and Execution Advisor
summary: Partnered with teams on strategy, delivery structure, and translating messy product problems into executable programs.
achievements: Helped teams define priorities, constraints, and measurable outcomes before implementation started.
Created communication and decision-making structures that reduced ambiguity across design, product, and engineering.
Supported high-context stakeholder conversations with concise product framing.

title: Platform and Product Operator
summary: Worked across product and platform initiatives, connecting roadmap decisions to operational delivery and user outcomes.
achievements: Mapped user and internal workflows into better operating models.
Connected technical capabilities with product priorities and release sequencing.
Drove cross-functional execution through structured decision frameworks.
